productDisplayName: Fusion Beats Women Beige & Orange Tunic
description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tunics, kurtas and kurtis that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with solid leggings and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product Details Beige sleeveless tunic, has a mandarin collar with a split V neckline, orange embroidery in front and orange piping around the arm holes Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
